subject: Totodile, a small blue bipedal crocodilian Pokemon with pink back ridges, sitting or resting near water among rocks and foliage
description: A small, stocky blue crocodilian Pokemon sits in a relaxed posture near a body of water. Its body is blue with a line of pink ridge-like protrusions running along its back and tail, and its large open mouth shows prominent teeth. The setting appears to be a rocky waterside environment with some foliage and what may be scattered objects or rocks nearby. The color palette is cool-toned, dominated by blues and greens, with soft ambient lighting suggesting an outdoor scene near water.
foreground: Totodile sitting near water, blue body with pink dorsal ridges, open-mouthed expression
background: Rocky waterside environment, cool greens and blues, scattered foliage
